articles.title: Jayson Tatum looked like a star again as Celtics roll past Hornets: 7 takeaways
articles.description:
Tatum put together his best game of the season on Sunday against the Hornets.

The post Jayson Tatum looked like a star again as Celtics roll past Hornets: 7 takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Jayson Tatum scored a season-high 38 points against the Hornets on March 29.
Celtics improved their record to 42-28, solidifying playoff positioning.
Tatum's performance boosts local fan morale ahead of the postseason.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown boasts on social media after Celtics clinch playoff berth for 12th straight season
articles.description:
"50 wins in a gap year."

The post Jaylen Brown boasts on social media after Celtics clinch playoff berth for 12th straight season appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics clinched playoff berth for 12th consecutive season on March 29, 2026.
Jaylen Brown celebrated the achievement, highlighting 50 wins during a challenging season.
Boston fans can expect playoff excitement as the team continues its strong performance.
